Notifications

Deploy notifications Get pinged every time someone ships to prod
Build failures Because "it compiles on my machine" is not a valid excuse
Slack pings at 3am "Hey, are you awake? The site is down" -- every SRE's nightmare
Weekend deploy alerts For those brave souls who push on Saturdays. Godspeed.

Danger Zone

Export your data
Download everything. Your code, your logs, your Stack Overflow search history.
Nuke the account
sudo rm -rf /your-account -- This cannot be undone. Seriously. No backsies.
